title: Trial Spawner Recipe
description: Now craft your own Trial Spawner
body:
🧿 Trial Spawner Recipe Datapack  
Summon the vault challenge—no structure scanning or RNG required!  
This datapack introduces a custom recipe for the Trial Spawner, letting players craft their own mob wave generator using keys and vault essence.

✨ Features  
✅ Shapeless recipe using 1 Ominous Trial Key + 1 Trial Key + 1 Echo Shard + 1 Block of Redstone  
🧩 Lore-friendly integration with Trial Chamber progression and redstone circuitry  
🔁 Modular JSON structure for easy editing and expansion  
🛠️ Compatible with Minecraft 1.21+
